use_cases: Download buttons displaying content download counts for software or media files
Action button groups for grouping related actions like download with additional metadata
Content download CTAs on landing pages, documentation sites, or file hosting platforms
ai_summary: A compact button group component combining a download action button with a metadata badge showing download count. Uses RTL-aware flexbox layout with shadow styling for visual separation. Designed for SaaS and media platforms to display download statistics alongside download actions.
